methods.Init:
ThisForm.BackColor = 16579320
	ThisForm.grd1.BackColor = 16777215
	ThisForm.grd1.Column1.Header1.Caption = "Nome"
	ThisForm.grd1.Column1.Header1.FontBold = .T.
	ThisForm.grd1.Column1.Header1.BackColor = 16119285
	ThisForm.grd1.Column1.Header1.ForeColor = 2758415
	ThisForm.grd1.Column2.Header1.Caption = "UF"
	ThisForm.grd1.Column2.Header1.FontBold = .T.
	ThisForm.grd1.Column2.Header1.BackColor = 16119285
	ThisForm.grd1.Column2.Header1.ForeColor = 2758415
	ThisForm.grd1.Column3.Header1.Caption = "Limite"

	ThisForm.grd1.Column3.Header1.BackColor = 16119285
	ThisForm.grd1.Column3.Header1.ForeColor = 2758415
	GO TOP IN curClientes
methods.Load:
CREATE CURSOR curClientes (nome C(30), uf C(2), limite N(10,2))
